false_positives.reason: Dynamic query uses psycopg2's parameterized placeholders (%s) with a separate params list. The ILIKE pattern with f-string constructs the parameter value, not the query itself. The %s in the SQL is a psycopg2 placeholder, not Python string formatting.

f-string constructs the WHERE clause structure from static condition strings (e.g., 'name ILIKE %s'). User values are never interpolated into the query text; they are passed via the params list to cur.execute().
